name: Mowen MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Mowen (墨问) — a Chinese knowledge management and note-taking application with Markdown support and AI-powered features. Enables AI agents to read, create, and manage notes in Mowen, integrating the Chinese note-taking platform with MCP-based agent workflows for knowledge capture and retrieval.
use_cases: Creating and organizing notes in Mowen from productivity agents
Searching and retrieving knowledge from Mowen note collections from research agents
Integrating Mowen note capture into automated workflows from automation agents
Summarizing and organizing Mowen knowledge bases from knowledge management agents
not_for: Non-Chinese users without Mowen accounts (platform is primarily Chinese)
Teams using Obsidian, Notion, or other note apps (use respective MCPs instead)
Users who need cross-platform note access (Mowen is a proprietary Chinese platform)
best_when: A Chinese-language user of Mowen wants to integrate AI agent workflows with their note-taking — automating capture, organization, and retrieval of Mowen notes.
avoid_when: You use any note-taking app other than Mowen, or are outside China's typical user base for this platform.

auth.notes: Mowen API token required. Authentication details from mowen.cn account settings. Service is Chinese platform.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Mowen free tier has note storage limits; AI features may require paid plan
pricing.paid_tiers: Mowen premium plans for unlimited notes and AI features
pricing.notes: MCP server is free open source. Mowen account required. Chinese payment methods (WeChat Pay, Alipay) typically used for premium plans.

known_agent_gotchas: Platform primarily Chinese-language — documentation and support in Chinese
Data stored in China — consider data sovereignty implications for non-Chinese users
Community MCP by individual developer — may not track Mowen API changes promptly
Mowen API may have limited public documentation — test API coverage before building workflows
agent_readiness.security_notes: Data stored in China on Mowen servers. Note content transmitted to Chinese cloud. Appropriate for personal notes — consider carefully for sensitive business information given CN data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: CN data residency. Note content stored on Chinese platform. API key auth. Not recommended for sensitive business data from non-CN jurisdictions.
